case_title: HAP LEONARD VS. ITAMAR LEVI et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONARD, HAP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEVI, ITAMAR TAASHUR, ROTEM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED OCT-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAASHUR, ROTEM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-29-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ITAMAR LEVI DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ITAMAR LEVI ONLY. JPT. ELIZABETH RILES. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $583.48 FILED BY LEONARD, HAP AS TO DEFENDANT LEVI, ITAMAR TAASHUR, ROTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
